plugins.name: git-ship
plugins.description: Commit staged changes with a generated message and push to the current branch

plugins.name: converge
plugins.description: Autonomous plan, TDD implement, review, fix loop until clean

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Generate a full-briefing handoff document for the next session

plugins.name: distill
plugins.description: Create a dense summary of the conversation in 5-10 bullet points

plugins.name: improve-prompt
plugins.description: Analyze and improve a prompt using documented best practices

plugins.name: compress
plugins.description: Compress text to minimal tokens while preserving all actionable information

plugins.name: namegen
plugins.description: Generate ~100 company name candidates for a concept via 6 parallel creative lenses

plugins.name: agents-md
plugins.description: Auto-discover AGENTS.md files and inject them as session instructions (like CLAUDE.md)

plugins.name: humanize
plugins.description: Rewrite AI-generated text to sound human by eliminating GPTisms — overused words, filler phrases, and structural tells

plugins.name: status
plugins.description: Read session notes, today's work log, and task list to produce a concise status report

plugins.name: shrink
plugins.description: Algorithmically compress text via the LLMLingua-2 model (token classification, not LLM rewrite)

plugins.name: atomize
plugins.description: Decompose unstructured text into atomic, decontextualized, deduped, source-verified semantic units

plugins.name: deep-research-efficient
plugins.description: Budget-bounded, model-tiered deep-research workflow with two-stage escalating verification

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: End-to-end ML research direction selection: scan bleeding edge, find shortfalls, generate directions, then narrow via cheap MVP gates and metric-first kill gates

plugins.name: hld
plugins.description: Produce a High-Level Design doc through grounded inquiry, then echo the full HLD back to the user

plugins.name: human-writing
plugins.description: Rewrite prose to minimize em dashes and strip all markdown-style formatting, two strong tells of AI-generated text (parentheses are fine)

plugins.name: agent-legible
plugins.description: Insert and maintain a canonical CLAUDE.md block instructing agents to write code the next agent can navigate, verify, and safely change

plugins.name: echo
plugins.description: Read a file exactly as-is into the chat so the user can see its entire contents
